sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105365" key="trifa/leia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐφάλεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n105365.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τρυφάλεια</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4081.tlg001.perseus-grc1:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Coluth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>, where the best cod. has <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φαλαρειαν.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
